subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is Thy servant and the son of Thy servant, who hath been set ablaze with the fire of Thy love and drawn by the breaths of Thy holiness, and hath accepted every affliction in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا عبدک و ابن عبدک الذی اشتعل بنار محبتک و انجذب بنفحات قدسک و قبل کل بلاء فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @suffering and imprisonment, @soul; spirit after death, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
